title: Build the accessible visual SDLC lineage experience
acceptance: The primary screen visibly answers What was asked?, What changed?, and Why was it decided? with source links.
A phase-by-iteration lineage canvas, contract evolution, changed-files-by-intent, verification evidence, explainability inspector, and raw record drawer are interactive.
Generated explanations are labeled and distinguish evidence from inference without exposing chain-of-thought.
The interface is keyboard accessible, responsive from 360px to desktop, and respects reduced motion.
